File Operations.desc: Open a file or create a new one
File Operations.details: Launches the nano editor to open an existing file or create a new one with the specified name.

File Operations.desc: Open a file and move cursor to <line>
File Operations.details: Opens the specified file and automatically positions the cursor at the beginning of the given line number.
Starts nano with mouse functionality enabled, allowing you to click to position the cursor and scroll with the wheel.

Navigation.details: Advances the cursor one position to the right.
Moves the cursor one position to the left.
Jumps the cursor forward to the start of the next word.
Jumps the cursor backward to the start of the previous word.

Navigation.desc: Move to the beginning of the line
Navigation.details: Positions the cursor at the start of the current line.

Navigation.desc: Move to the end of the line
Navigation.details: Positions the cursor at the end of the current line.
Scrolls the view down by one full screen page.
Scrolls the view up by one full screen page.

Navigation.desc: Move to the first line of the file
Navigation.details: Jumps the cursor to the very beginning of the first line in the file.

Navigation.desc: Move to the last line of the file
Navigation.details: Jumps the cursor to the very end of the last line in the file.

Navigation.desc: Go to a specific line and column number
Navigation.details: Prompts for a line and optional column number to jump the cursor to.

Editing.desc: Cut the current line (or selected text)
Editing.details: Removes the current line or a marked region of text and stores it in the 'cutbuffer'.
Inserts the contents of the cutbuffer at the current cursor position.

Editing.desc: Copy the current line (or selected text)
Editing.details: Copies the current line or a marked region into the cutbuffer without removing it from the file.

Editing.desc: Mark text starting from the cursor position
Editing.details: Toggles the selection of text; move the cursor to highlight the region you want to copy or cut.
Removes the character directly under the cursor position.
Removes the character immediately to the left of the cursor.
Reverts the most recent editing change made to the document.
Re-applies the most recent change that was previously undone.

Search and Replace.details: Opens a prompt at the bottom to search for a string forward in the document.
Opens a prompt to search for a string backward from the current position.
Searches again for the most recently used search term in the forward direction.
Opens a prompt to search for a string and then another prompt to specify its replacement.

Save and Exit.details: Saves the changes made to the current file immediately.
Prompts for a filename to save the current buffer into.

Save and Exit.desc: Exit nano (prompts to save if modified)
Save and Exit.details: Closes the nano editor. If there are unsaved changes, it will ask if you want to save them first.

Information.details: Shows the built-in documentation for nano's commands and features.
Displays the current line, column, and character position of the cursor at the bottom of the screen.
